stemHtml: While planning a flight on a clear, moon-lit night under VFR and deciding on what visual navigation features to use, a pilot should consider that…

options.a: colour differences will be very difficult to identify.
options.b: visibility is worst when flying in the direction of (towards) the moon.
options.c: narrow rivers are easy to see.
options.d: roads, including busy ones, are difficult to see.
